LanguageData.BionicPenis.label: 仿生陰莖
LanguageData.BionicPenis.description: 先進的人造陰莖，使用微調過的壓力傳感器和 PID 控制器來分析對象的收縮情況。它可以擴展，收縮甚至振動以符合對象的喜好。
LanguageData.BionicPenis.stages.0.label: 微小
LanguageData.BionicPenis.stages.1.label: 小
LanguageData.BionicPenis.stages.2.label: 普通
LanguageData.BionicPenis.stages.3.label: 大
LanguageData.BionicPenis.stages.4.label: 巨大
LanguageData.BionicPenis.stages.5.label: 參天
LanguageData.BionicVagina.label: 仿生陰道
LanguageData.BionicVagina.description: 先進的仿生陰道，使用內部壓力傳感器來適應對象的尺寸，速度。
LanguageData.BionicVagina.stages.0.label: 過窄
LanguageData.BionicVagina.stages.1.label: 緊
LanguageData.BionicVagina.stages.2.label: 普通
LanguageData.BionicVagina.stages.3.label: 鬆
LanguageData.BionicVagina.stages.4.label: 過鬆
LanguageData.BionicVagina.stages.5.label: 深淵
LanguageData.BionicAnus.label: 仿生肛門
LanguageData.BionicAnus.stages.0.label: 過窄
LanguageData.BionicAnus.stages.1.label: 緊
LanguageData.BionicAnus.stages.2.label: 普通
LanguageData.BionicAnus.stages.3.label: 鬆
LanguageData.BionicAnus.stages.4.label: 過鬆
LanguageData.BionicAnus.stages.5.label: 深淵
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.label: 仿生乳房
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.0.label: 平坦
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.1.label: 微
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.2.label: 小
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.3.label: 普通
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.4.label: 大
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.5.label: 龐大
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.6.label: 巨大
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.7.label: 極大
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.8.label: 巨人級
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.9.label: 巨像級
LanguageData.BionicBreasts.stages.10.label: 巨神級
